Visit Pear Tree

Schedule a tour of our campus.

Tours every Thursday. Our admin team will reach out within 2 business days to confirm a time.

What to expect

  • A walkthrough of our classrooms and outdoor spaces
  • Time with our founder or admissions team to ask questions
  • An honest conversation about financial aid options

Prefer to call?

We're happy to chat by phone or email.

(510) 817-4690

admin@peartreecs.com

Tour registration

Required fields are marked with *.

Parent / Guardian

Child #1

Child #2 (optional)

Enrollment

Thank you! Your tour request was sent.

Our admin team will reach out within 2 business days to confirm a time. If you don't hear from us, please email admin@peartreecs.com or call (510) 817-4690.
